name: Roma Group Limited
summary: Roma Group Limited, an investment holding company, provides valuation and technical advisory services in Hong Kong. The company offers valuation services for business and intangible assets, such as business contracts, mining and exploration rights, customer relationships, franchises, distribution and publicity rights, technology and software applications, trademarks, patents, copyrights, domain names, Websites, and publication rights; and natural resources valuation and technical advisory services, including exploration planning, project feasibility study, resource estimation, evaluation, environmental and social, and risk management services. It also provides valuation services for financial instruments comprising accumulators/decumulators, call and put options, convertible bonds, convertible preference shares, equity-linked investments, financial guarantees, forward/futures contracts, share options, structured products, swap contracts, and warrants; property valuation services for various types of properties; credit and risk evaluation services; biological assets valuation services; and purchase price allocation services, as well as various services for clients' antiques, work of art, and collectables. In addition, the company offers machineries and equipment valuation services for manufacturing processes and industrial facility installations; various technical advisory services; and corporate advisory services, such as business planning, feasibility studies, fairness opinions, risk control and management, alliance with other professional parties, advisory before issuance of financial instruments, and advisory on regulatory and accounting standards, as well as valuation-related consultancy services related to mergers and acquisitions, initial public offerings, private placements, and others. It provides marketing and event organization, financing, property investment, and ESG and credit reporting services. The company is headquartered in Wan Chai, Hong Kong.
